title: The Schism of Blastus at Rome.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: Others, of whom Florinus was chief, flourished at Rome.
He fell from the presbyterate of the Church, and Blastus was involved in a similar fall.
They also drew away many of the Church to their opinion, each striving to introduce his own innovations in respect to the truth.
